platforms.myPlatformsSub: Connect and launch your game clients
platforms.comingSoonSub: Steam, Epic Games and more in one launcher

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Your installed games from all platforms will appear here.
library.footer: In future versions, Kalimotxo will index Wine-installed titles per store.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Client and patch install queue. Used when multiple stores are active.

comingSoon.body: Kalimotxo will unify several stores in one launcher. {{store}} will arrive in a future update.
comingSoon.hint: For now, use Battle.net from Platforms.

battlenet.heroStartSub: One button: Kalimotxo sets everything up and opens Blizzard. The first run may take a few minutes.
battlenet.heroAlmostSub: Finish the setup in the Battle.net window on your Mac.
battlenet.heroWizardSub: Follow Blizzard's installer. When done, come back and press the button again.
battlenet.heroReadySub: Open the client, install games, and press Play on each title.
battlenet.workingHint: Keep Kalimotxo open. macOS may ask for your password once.
battlenet.stuckAt45Hint: Blizzard stuck at 45%? Use the button below to close processes, repair the Agent, and reopen the installer.
battlenet.advancedHint: Only if something breaks: repair files or uninstall.
battlenet.repairBottleHint: Reconciles the prefix with the active Wine (Wine 11) without deleting the client. Use if the window doesn't appear after repeated attempts.

taglines.battlenet: Blizzard — WoW, Diablo, Overwatch and more
